title: Devdas
writer: Sarat Chandra Chattopadhyay, P.C. Barua, Kidar Nath Sharma
actors: K.L. Saigal, A.H. Shore, Pahadi Sanyal
plot: Devdas (Saigal/Barua), son of a zamindar, and Parvati (aka Paro)(Jamuna), his poor neighbour's daughter, are childhood sweethearts. Status and caste differences prevent their marriage and Devdas is sent to Calcutta while Paro is m...
